description: AIC Medical Escort and Transport (MET) subsidy framework. Read by eligibility.ts to compute SubsidyComputation per booking.

sources.name: MOH Subsidy framework for Non-Residential Long-Term Care Services
Singapore Budget 2025: LTC subsidy enhancements (effective 1 July 2026)

eligibility.ageRequirement: No formal minimum age. Service is for seniors who cannot travel independently for medical appointments at hospitals, specialist outpatient clinics, or polyclinics.
applicationChannels: Doctor at hospital or polyclinic submits online
Medical social worker at hospital or polyclinic

baseSubsidy.description: Base subsidy applied as a percentage of trip cost, by Per Capita Household Income (PCHI) tier. Effective 1 October 2024.
baseSubsidy.pchiCalculation: Total gross household monthly income divided by total number of family members at the same NRIC address.

noIncomeFallback.description: When household has zero income, subsidy is determined by Annual Value (AV) of property as assessed by IRAS.
noIncomeFallback.noteIfAVExceedsThreshold: If AV > $21,000 with no income, subsidy rate is 0%.

interimRebates.description: Interim Long-Term Care Rebates for MET. Stack on top of base subsidy. SG Citizens only. Effective 1 July 2025 to 30 June 2026 inclusive.
interimRebates.unitDescription: Fixed dollar amount deducted per round-trip after base subsidy.

serviceTiers.transport_only: Vehicle only, no escort accompanying the senior.
serviceTiers.basic_escort_transport: Vehicle plus basic escort to clinic door.
serviceTiers.accompanied_escort_transport: Vehicle plus escort who stays through the appointment.

costRangeReference.description: Approximate pre-subsidy cost range per round-trip across AIC partner providers.

calculationFormula.description: How to compute the final cost the senior pays.
steps: 1. Look up base subsidy rate from baseSubsidy.tiers[citizenship] using PCHI
3. If today <= interimRebates.expiresAt AND citizenship == sg_citizen: look up rebate from interimRebates.byServiceTier[serviceTier] using PCHI

example.scenario: Auntie Tan, SG Citizen, PCHI = $800/month, basic_escort_transport, base cost $90

upcomingChanges.description: Subsidy enhancements announced at Budget 2025, effective 1 July 2026.
highlights: PCHI threshold ceiling rises from $3,600 to $4,800
Home Caregiving Grant max payout rises from $400 to $600 per month
